footer.tagline: A minimal, security-first PHP CMS for people who want to ship a website, not maintain a platform.
footer.copy: WhimCMS — open showcase. Strip the demo themes to use it as your own site.

home.title: WhimCMS — a minimal, security-first PHP CMS
home.description: Server-rendered, file-based, no build step. One repo you can read in an afternoon and host anywhere PHP runs.

imprint.title: Imprint — WhimCMS
imprint.description: Operator information for this WhimCMS deployment.

privacy.title: Privacy — WhimCMS
privacy.description: What this site stores, what it does not, and how to reach the operator.

demo-business.title: Business demo — WhimCMS
demo-business.description: A SaaS-style landing page rendered by WhimCMS. Same blocks, different theme.

demo-personal.title: Personal demo — WhimCMS
demo-personal.description: A creator portfolio rendered by WhimCMS. Same blocks, different theme.

demo-trainer.title: Trainer demo — WhimCMS
demo-trainer.description: A functional-fitness coach landing rendered by WhimCMS.

demo-dev.title: Dev demo — WhimCMS
demo-dev.description: A developer-tool landing rendered by WhimCMS.

_404.title: Not found
_404.description: The page you were looking for is not here. It may have moved, or never existed.

recipient.subject: New contact-form submission
recipient.intro: Someone reached out via the WhimCMS demo contact form:
recipient.footer: Sent from the WhimCMS demo install.

sender.subject: We received your message
sender.body: Thanks for reaching out — your message arrived safely. We'll reply as soon as we can.

form.name: Your name
form.sent: Thanks — your message is on its way.

errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.

globalErrors.token: Your session expired. Please reload the page and try again.
globalErrors.rate_limit: Too many submissions in a short time. Please wait a moment.
globalErrors.mail_failed: We could not send your message. Please try again later or write to us directly.
